ROI on Life and
Legacy
Overview
An overview of ROI on Life and Legacy. Success within
the Legacy program is tied to those who consume and
use the content. This play will help anyone looking to
embrace being an entrepreneur, especially those who
struggle to consume the Legacy content.
- Primary and Secondary Objectives for ROI on Life and
Legacy
- Introduce The 5 Core Habits
- What your ROI for this course is
